qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing CSRF token protection on state-changing endpoints with SameSite=None session cookie
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding concerns missing CSRF checks and SameSite=None session cookie behavior across state-changing endpoints such as pluginSwitch.json.php; it does not identify objects/category.php::fixCleanTitle(), direct SQL interpolation of clean_title or id, or an equivalent SQL injection source-to-sink path.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding matches the advisory-described SQL injection in objects/category.php::fixCleanTitle(), where clean_title and id are interpolated into a SELECT query without parameterization.
evidence: The target advisory identifies CWE-89 in objects/category.php::fixCleanTitle() through unparameterized clean_title and id variables.
The only final qualifying finding in the session manifest is csrf_missing_protection.
csrf_missing_protection identifies missing CSRF token enforcement and SameSite=None cookie behavior in state-changing endpoints, not the category.php SQL query construction root cause.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so PoC execution is not applicable.
